title: Lakeside Behavioral Health - Mental Health Technician
description: Provide direct care and assist with daily living activities such as hygiene and meals, while offering emotional support. Maintain a safe, structured environment by monitoring patient behavior and reporting any changes to clinical staff. Support implementation of treatment plans, including assistance during group therapy or recreational activities.

title: Saito Japanese Restaurant - Hibachi Chef, Line Cook
description: I began working at Saito when I turned 16, and very quickly became interested in cooking. Four years later, whenever I have free time and need a job on the side, I am always welcome back to resume my role.
